highlights.text: Private Seine River dinner cruise with Eiffel Tower views
Eiffel Tower skip-the-line & Montmartre artistic walk

itinerary.title: Romantic Paris Honeymoon
itinerary.tagline: Eiffel Tower • Seine Cruise • Montmartre • Versailles • Luxury Dining
itinerary.overview: Begin your lifelong love story in the most poetic city in the world. TRAGUIN's curated Paris honeymoon retreat offers an unparalleled blend of classic French romance, world-class culinary experiences, and iconic landmark exploration. Designed for absolute comfort and privacy, this Romantic Paris journey guarantees unforgettable memories in the heart of the City of Light.
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Paris honeymoon package (FR-002): Seine dinner cruise, Eiffel Tower, Versailles, Louvre, Montmartre, and candlelight farewell dinner.

days.title: Arrival in Paris & Seine River Dinner Cruise
days.description: Arrive in Paris, the City of Light. Your private transfer will escort you to your ultra-luxury hotel. Celebrate your first evening with a private dinner cruise on the Seine River, viewing iconic landmarks like the Eiffel Tower illuminated.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, private Seine dinner cruise
Evening Experience: Private dinner cruise with Eiffel Tower views

days.title: Eiffel Tower & Artistic Montmartre
days.description: Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower with skip-the-line access. Later, explore the charming artistic district of Montmartre, visit the Sacré-Cœur Basilica, and enjoy a private artistic walking tour through its quaint streets.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Eiffel Tower skip-the-line, Montmartre private walking tour, Sacré-Cœur Basilica

days.title: Palace of Versailles
days.description: A private excursion to the majestic Palace of Versailles. Explore the royal apartments and stroll through the expansive, beautiful royal gardens in style.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private Palace of Versailles excursion, royal gardens

days.title: Louvre Museum & Shopping
days.description: Discover artistic treasures at the Louvre Museum. Spend your afternoon enjoying leisurely luxury shopping along the Champs-Élysées.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Louvre Museum guided visit, Champs-Élysées leisure time

days.title: Leisure & Romantic Dinner
days.description: Spend a relaxing day exploring local cafes, visiting charming patisseries, and enjoying a farewell candlelight dinner in a romantic garden restaurant.
activities: Evening Experience: Candlelight farewell dinner in garden restaurant

days.title: Departure
days.description: Enjoy a final French breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer, completing your romantic Paris honeymoon.

inclusions.text: 05 Nights in handpicked ultra-luxury honeymoon hotel in Paris
Private chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers throughout
Private Seine River dinner cruise on arrival evening
Eiffel Tower skip-the-line access and Louvre Museum visit
Private Palace of Versailles excursion with royal gardens
International airfare and France entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
